---
title: Julia
description: |
  Research computing in &nbsp;[![](img/logo_julia.png){width="1.6em"}](https://julialang.org/)
title-block-banner: true
---

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Courses</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Getting started with &nbsp;![](img/logo_julia.png){width="1.6em"}](top_intro.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[An intro course to Julia]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[High-performance &nbsp;![](img/logo_julia.png){width="1.6em"}](top_hpc.qmd){.card-title2 .stretched-link}

[An HPC course on Julia]{.button-subtitle}

:::

:::

::::

<em><font color="#727474"><span style="font-size: 1.2rem;">Webinars</span></font></em>

:::{layout="[5, 5, 5, -5]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Visualization with ![](img/logo_makie.png){width="3.3em"}](wb_makie.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[First gentle dab at &nbsp;![](img/logo_julia.png){width="1.2em"}](wb_firstdab.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Deep learning with ![](img/logo_flux.png){width="3.1em"}](wb_flux.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
